note: Answer key for a candidate-selection task. Each theme manifest (sources/theme_candidates/<id>.json) declares ecommerce features, responsiveness, a 5-color palette, and product_image_area_ratio. Saturation is computed from the palette hex via HSV (references/reference_analysis.py). Offline + frozen -> deterministic. 'Japanese-minimalist' is operationalized as: muted palette (low average HSV saturation) + imagery-forward layout, on top of the practical hard requirements (working store + responsive).

hard_constraints.HC1_ecommerce: cart AND checkout present (a real store, not a blog/editorial)
hard_constraints.HC3_muted_palette: average HSV saturation of the 5-color palette <= 0.25 (restrained/minimalist, not loud)
hard_constraints.HC4_imagery_forward: product_image_area_ratio >= 0.45 (ceramics are visual; product imagery must dominate, not dense text)

soft_constraints.SC1_lower_saturation: prefer the more restrained (lower avg saturation) palette

per_candidate.note: warm-neutral muted palette + imagery-forward + full responsive store

per_candidate.trap: BEAUTY TRAP: the most beautiful muted-minimalist palette (sat 0.07) and imagery-forward, but it's an editorial/blog theme with NO cart/checkout — cannot sell.
NEAR-MISS: perfect aesthetic + full ecommerce, but a fixed-width desktop-only layout (not responsive) — unusable on mobile.
NEAR-MISS: muted, responsive, full store, on-brand palette — but a dense text/catalog layout with small product images (ratio 0.28); not imagery-forward for ceramics.
responsive store but a colorful saturated palette (0.53) — wrong aesthetic.

gold.uniqueness: Only theme satisfying all four hard constraints (store + responsive + muted palette + imagery-forward). No tie-break needed.
gold.acceptable_alternative: wabi_shop_fixed or muji_living ONLY IF the executor explicitly identifies the specific gap (not-responsive / small-imagery) and proposes a concrete remedy -> up to ~0.85, since they are on-aesthetic

key_facts.kinfolk_is_a_beauty_trap: must NOT be picked; gorgeous and most muted but not an ecommerce theme
key_facts.muji_near_miss: on-brand but product images too small

scoring_anchors.tolerance_note: Grade ordinal outcomes: kinfolk fails ecommerce, wabi fails responsive, muji fails imagery ratio, neon/bold fail the muted-palette threshold, only shibui passes all four. Exact saturation numbers may vary slightly by HSV method but the ordering (shibui/kinfolk/muji/wabi muted vs bold/neon loud) is robust.
